_comment: Canonical anchors for Amanogawa.Atlas.TimeScale (issue #019), consumed verbatim by both test/amanogawa/atlas/time_scale_test.exs (ExUnit) and assets/js/test/time_scale.test.js (node:test). Positions are computed once (double-precision ln/exp, the same primitives both implementations use) and written in hard, never regenerated at test time. The config pins a snapshot of the default domain (F04 decision D1: max_year is the current UTC year at runtime, 2026 when this file was last regenerated); the anchors verify the FORMULA contract between the two implementations against this pinned config, so they stay valid even after max_year moves on. If the formula, min_year, or pivot ever change, this file must be regenerated and both suites must fail, then pass again, together.

anchors.label: Battle of Marathon (astronomical year -489, 490 BCE, F02 anchor)
